evidence.observation: The friend-directed page turns the exact synthetic message into a focused celebratory moment with no unrelated product sections.
Manual desktop and mobile review found a decisive recipient-to-message-to-signature sequence with supporting copy kept subordinate.
System type is used as an authored display system with strong scale contrast, tabular micro-label rhythm, readable support copy, and no font-loading cost.
The asymmetric desktop poster recomposes into a purposeful vertical mobile sequence instead of shrinking the desktop layout.
One message and one replay action dominate; labels, reading order, and closing metadata remain clear at both viewport classes.
The replay control has keyboard/pointer behavior, visible focus, pressed/disabled feedback, focus restoration, and a local live-status update.
Default, revealed-message, replaying/disabled, and reduced-motion outcomes are implemented; no data, permission, or network states apply to this static page.

Semantic structure, source order, high contrast, visible focus, forced colors, keyboard replay, live status, no-JavaScript content, and reduced motion are implemented; no full screen-reader session ran.
Manual review covered 1440×1000, 390×844, and 390×1200 captures after a mobile-specific refinement; no horizontal overflow or clipped message remained.
The production build is dependency-free with no network assets, a 15,227-byte measured payload, and 867 bytes of JavaScript.
The exact synthetic user message is preserved and the brief supporting lines are original expressive copy without fabricated claims, metrics, or testimonials.
The finish-line editorial metaphor, route line, checker mark, warm paper, cobalt field, and safety-orange signature form a repeatable concept-specific system.
The implementation is split into semantic HTML, tokenized CSS, and a small single-purpose script with no dependency or framework overhead.
No visual reference was supplied; fidelity was verified against the exact synthetic message and the recorded design thesis instead.
Manual review found no generic centered hero, three-card row, gradient personality, glass stack, fake proof, arbitrary icons, or scroll-reveal proliferation.
The visible replay control is real, the page remains complete without JavaScript, the independent production build passes, and no external submission or backend success is implied.
